title: ruwts #7323
definition:
1) to run
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to run
        1a2) runners (participle as subst)
    1b) (Polel) to run swiftly, dart
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to bring or move quickly, hurry
        1c2) to drive away from, cause to run away
